ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields are legible. Certificate number SEG-23D-868933, issued 2023-07-11 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields are legible. Commercial invoice 1903 issued by Berg Propulsion Production AB.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains 'S5467TR005/1' which is an order number, not an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar exists in the certificate.

consignor_search_step2b.conclusion: The certificate consignor is 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' at Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40 HÖNÖ, Sweden. The invoice footer contains 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' at the same visiting address (Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN). 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is a commercial abbreviation of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. This is relevant for rule 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur) and 4.1.3.3 (kommersiell förkortning).

criteria_met.details: Certificate consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' at Tärnvägen 15, HÖNÖ, Sweden matches invoice issuer 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' at Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN (commercial abbreviation, same address).
Certificate consignee includes 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' and 'Llyr Marine Gabon'. Invoice delivery address includes 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz'.

pairing_validation.reasoning: At least two of three pairing criteria are met. Document pair is valid.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: The exact string 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' does NOT appear anywhere in the invoice. However, 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' appears in the invoice footer (visiting address) at the same street address (Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ). The certificate name appears to be an abbreviation. Proceeding to sequential rules 4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate name 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' can be identified as the same legal party as 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'.
comparison_steps.result: The names differ: 'Prop' vs 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' vs 'Production'. These appear to be commercial abbreviations rather than different words. Proceeding to 4.1.3.3 for commercial abbreviation assessment.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is a prefix truncation of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'.
comparison_steps.result: Not a pure prefix truncation — the abbreviations 'Prop' and 'Prod.' are shortened forms of words, not layout cutoff. Proceeding to 4.1.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is a vedertagen kommersiell förkortning of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'.
comparison_steps.result: APPLICABLE. (1) 'Prop' is a clear and vedertagen abbreviation of 'Propulsion'. 'Prod.' is a clear and vedertagen abbreviation of 'Production'. (2) The full legal name 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' expressly appears in the invoice footer (both mailing and visiting address). (3) No other legal party with a similar name structure exists in the invoice. (4) The address matches exactly: Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, Sweden in both documents. (5) No information in the invoice contradicts that this is the same legal party. All 5 conditions met → MATCH via 4.1.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice issuer country: SWEDEN (footer). Also confirmed via VAT reg. no. SE556568305801 (SE prefix = Sweden).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. Country verified via explicit address ('SWEDEN') and VAT prefix 'SE'.

rules_applied.rule_description: Kommersiell förkortning – vedertagen förkortning av ord i det juridiska företagsnamnet
Landkontroll – country must match after normalization
Landverifiering via indirekta identifierare – VAT prefix SE

evidence.description: Invoice issuer full legal name (footer visiting address)
evidence.raw_text: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN

evidence.description: Invoice VAT registration number confirming SE (Sweden)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate lists consignor as 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' at Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40 HÖNÖ, Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' at visiting address Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN. 'Prop' is a vedertagen commercial abbreviation of 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' is a vedertagen commercial abbreviation of 'Production'. The full legal name appears expressly in the invoice footer, the address is identical, no other similar party exists, and country matches (Sweden, confirmed also via VAT prefix SE). All conditions of rule 4.1.3.3 are met. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Treat as different legal entities because the names differ
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.1.3.3 expressly permits vedertagna förkortningar when the full legal name appears in the invoice and all conditions are met. 'Prop'→'Propulsion' and 'Prod.'→'Production' are clear abbreviations, not different words.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Master M/V Skoul Ruz, Llyr Marine Gabon, Rue du Colonel Parant Littoral, BP 584 Port Gentil, Gabon
checkpoints.invoice_value: Delivery address: Master M/V Skoul Ruz, C/o Navitrans CDG, ZA du Moulin Rue de la Croix, 95734 Roissy en France, FRANCE. Invoice address: Machinefabriek Bolier BV, Grevelingenweg 21, 3313 LB Dordrecht, THE NETHERLANDS

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing field in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: The invoice has an 'Invoice address' field with 'Machinefabriek Bolier BV, Grevelingenweg 21, 3313 LB Dordrecht, THE NETHERLANDS'. This is a faktureringsfält. The certificate consignee is 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz / Llyr Marine Gabon' in Gabon. The certificate consignee does NOT match the Invoice address (Machinefabriek Bolier BV). However, the certificate consignee 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' IS found in the Delivery address field. Checking if Ship-To-rule (4.2.0.3) applies.

comparison_steps.description: Check if the certificate was issued for the end recipient (Ship-To party).
comparison_steps.result: APPLICABLE. (1) Certificate consignee 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' can be identified exactly in the invoice Delivery address field (after normalization). (2) The invoice's Bill-To/Invoice address is 'Machinefabriek Bolier BV' in The Netherlands — a different party, likely a trading/purchasing company. (3) Both the certificate consignee and the invoice Bill-To party appear in the SAME invoice, confirming they are part of the same supply chain transaction. (4) Nothing in the invoice contradicts that 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' is the actual end recipient of the goods — the goods label explicitly says 'Skoul Ruz 5467T', confirming the vessel as the destination. All 4 conditions of 4.2.0.3 are met → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Gabon. Invoice delivery address country: FRANCE. The certificate lists the consignee's address in Gabon (BP 584 Port Gentil, Gabon), while the invoice delivery address is in France (95734 Roissy en France). However, the delivery address in the invoice says 'C/o Navitrans CDG' which is a freight forwarding address (CDG = Charles de Gaulle airport area). The actual vessel/consignee is 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' which is a vessel name. The invoice delivery address is a transit/logistics address, not the final destination. Under 4.2.0.3, the Ship-To rule focuses on identifying the entity name, not requiring exact address/country match for the transit address. The certificate identifies the vessel and its operating company (Llyr Marine Gabon) in Gabon. The difference in delivery country (France transit vs Gabon final destination) is explained by the transit logistics arrangement.
comparison_steps.result: The consignee entity name 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' is identified in the invoice delivery address. The country discrepancy (Gabon in certificate vs France in invoice delivery address) is attributable to the use of a freight forwarding transit address in France. The Ship-To rule (4.2.0.3) identifies the entity, and the goods label 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' confirms the shipment is for this vessel. The land difference reflects transit logistics, not a different consignee. MATCH under 4.2.0.3 with slightly reduced confidence.

rules_applied.rule_description: Ship-To-regel – certificate issued for end recipient (vessel), invoice Bill-To is a separate purchasing entity
MATCH – company name identified in invoice, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when same entity is verified

evidence.description: Invoice goods label confirming vessel destination

checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate consignee is 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz / Llyr Marine Gabon' in Port Gentil, Gabon. The invoice has two parties: Invoice address = 'Machinefabriek Bolier BV' in Netherlands (the buyer), and Delivery address = 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' c/o a freight forwarder in France. Under rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel), the COO is regularly issued for the end recipient of the goods (the vessel), not the billing intermediary. 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' is exactly identified in the invoice delivery address. Both parties appear in the same invoice. The goods label 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' confirms the vessel as the goods destination. The address difference (Gabon vs France) is explained by the transit forwarding address in France — the goods are in transit to the vessel. Rule 4.2.4 states that address differences do not cause MISMATCH when the same entity is verified. Result: MATCH with confidence 0.88 due to the country difference in addresses (explained by transit logistics).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice address is Machinefabriek Bolier BV, not matching certificate consignee
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel) applies: the COO is issued for the end recipient (the vessel), not the billing intermediary. The vessel name is found in the invoice delivery address.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate consignee is in Gabon but invoice delivery is in France
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The invoice delivery address is a freight forwarding transit address (c/o Navitrans CDG, near Charles de Gaulle airport). Rule 4.2.4 states address differences do not cause MISMATCH when the same entity is identified. The vessel 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' is a mobile entity, and the transit point does not define the consignee's country.

checkpoints.certificate_value: One case - Skoul Ruz 5467T, 83x63x67 cm, HS CODE: 84836020, Country of origin: ES
checkpoints.invoice_value: Pos 10: AK92786 GEAR TOOTH COUP, CN code: 84836020, Country of origin: Spain. Goods label: Skoul Ruz 5467T. Dimensions: 83x63x67cm 180kg

comparison_steps.description: Check if the certificate contains article numbers that should be matched.
comparison_steps.result: The certificate does not contain an explicit article/part number (like 'AK92786'). The certificate references 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' which is a goods label/vessel reference, not an article number per se. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in the certificate and match against the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: The certificate goods description is 'One case - Skoul Ruz 5467T, 83x63x67 cm, HS CODE: 84836020'. The identitetsbärande elements are: (1) 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' — the goods label, (2) HS code '84836020', (3) dimensions '83x63x67 cm'. Checking each against the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Skoul Ruz 5467T'. Invoice: Goods label field shows 'Skoul Ruz 5467T'.
comparison_steps.result: EXACT MATCH. The goods label 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' in the certificate is identically found in the invoice goods label field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: HS CODE 84836020. Invoice: CN code 84836020.
comparison_steps.result: EXACT MATCH. HS code / CN code '84836020' matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '83x63x67 cm'. Invoice: '83x63x67cm'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after normalization (space before 'cm' is insignificant).

comparison_steps.description: The certificate describes goods as one case for vessel Skoul Ruz 5467T with HS code 84836020 and dimensions 83x63x67 cm. The invoice contains these exact identifiers. The invoice additionally describes the item as 'GEAR TOOTH COUP' (gear tooth coupling) which is additional detail in the invoice beyond what the certificate states. Per rule 2.1 (ensidig verifiering), the certificate's description can be identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. All identitetsbärande elements from the certificate are found in the invoice.

rules_applied.rule_description: Tillägg som inte påverkar produktidentitet – additional product name in invoice is extra info
Ensidig verifiering – certificate information verified against invoice, extra invoice details not causing MISMATCH

evidence.raw_text:
One case - Skoul Ruz 5467T
83x63x67 cm
HS CODE: 84836020
Country of origin: ES

evidence.description: Invoice CN code matching certificate HS code

checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate describes goods as 'One case - Skoul Ruz 5467T, 83x63x67 cm, HS CODE: 84836020'. The invoice contains: Goods label 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' (exact match), CN code '84836020' (exact match), dimensions '83x63x67cm' (match after space normalization). The invoice also describes the product as 'GEAR TOOTH COUP' — this is additional detail present in the invoice but not in the certificate, which per rule 2.1 (ensidig verifiering) does not cause MISMATCH. All identitetsbärande elements from the certificate can be identified in the invoice. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'One case - Skoul Ruz 5467T' but invoice says 'GEAR TOOTH COUP'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate's identitetsbärande elements (goods label 'Skoul Ruz 5467T', HS code 84836020, dimensions 83x63x67 cm) are all found in the invoice. 'GEAR TOOTH COUP' is additional product detail in the invoice. Per rule 2.1, the verification is unilateral: the certificate's description must be verifiable against the invoice, not vice versa.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains '180 kg'. Certificate box 6 contains 'One case'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, the quantity in box 7 is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet.
comparison_steps.result: Verifieringsgrundande kvantitet: 180 kg (from box 7).

comparison_steps.description: Search for '180 kg' in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. The invoice contains '83x63x67cm 180kg' below the line items (in the area of Pos 40). The numeric value 180 and unit kg are both present. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: The certificate states '180 kg' without explicit GW/NW category. Check rule 4.4.2.2 point 2.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states ONE weight value (180 kg) without category. Invoice also shows '180kg' without explicit GW/NW. The Total by CN code shows 'Net weight: 0,00 kg' which is inconsistent (likely a system artifact for a non-weight-based item). The only matching weight in the invoice is '180kg' appearing alongside dimensions. Since the certificate has only ONE weight value and the invoice confirms this exact value, and no contradictory alternative weight of another category exists, rule 4.4.2.2 point 2 applies → MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains two quantity indications: '180 kg' (box 7) and 'One case' (box 6). At least one must be verified.
comparison_steps.result: 180 kg is verified via förekomstkontroll (exact match in invoice). 'One case' is a försändelsekvantitet per 4.4.3.2. MINST EN verified → MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Förekomstkontroll – numeric value 180 and unit kg identified in invoice
Single weight value without category, confirmed in invoice without contradictory alternative

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '180 kg'. The invoice contains '180kg' in the dimensions/weight line below the line items. The numeric value 180 and unit kg match exactly (normalization of space before 'kg' is allowed). The certificate has only one weight value without explicit GW/NW category; the invoice confirms the same value without contradictory alternatives (the 'Net weight: 0,00 kg' in Total by CN code is clearly a system default, not an actual weight). Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, a single weight value confirmed in the invoice without contradiction → MATCH. Additionally, the certificate's 'One case' in box 6 is a försändelsekvantitet per 4.4.3.2. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice 'Net weight' in Total by CN code shows 0,00 kg, contradicting 180 kg
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The '0,00 kg' in the Total by CN code section is clearly a system artifact — the invoice system apparently does not track net weight for this item type. The actual weight '180kg' appears alongside the dimensions, explicitly matching the certificate's 180 kg. The 0,00 kg is not a credible alternative weight.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice line item Pos. 10 contains 'Country of origin: Spain'. This is an explicit origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'ES'. Invoice states 'Spain'. ISO alpha-2 code ES = Spain.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after normalization. ES is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for Spain. 'ES' = 'Spain'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5 – Ursprungsland har ingen koppling till consignorns land
comparison_steps.description: Note: Certificate consignor is in Sweden, origin is ES (Spain). This is perfectly valid per rule 4.5 — origin refers to where goods are manufactured, not where the consignor is located.
comparison_steps.result: No issue. Different origin and consignor country is normal.

rules_applied.rule_description: Identifiering i fakturan – explicit 'Country of origin: Spain' found

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'ES' as the country of origin. The invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Spain' for line item Pos. 10 (GEAR TOOTH COUP, CN code 84836020). 'ES' is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for Spain. After normalization per rule 4.5.4, these are identical. Result: MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Remarks field contains 'S5467TR005/1' which is an order number. No bank term context present.
PASSED. Consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' identified as 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' in invoice (same address). Consignee 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' found in invoice delivery address.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – search for consignor name in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Exact string 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' not found, but 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' found at same address. Proceeded to sequential rules.
Not a prefix truncation — the certificate uses abbreviated words (Prop, Prod.) rather than a cutoff prefix.
MATCH. 'Prop'='Propulsion', 'Prod.'='Production' are vedertagna förkortningar. All 5 conditions met.
Invoice address (faktureringsfält) is 'Machinefabriek Bolier BV'. Certificate consignee not found there. Checked Ship-To-regel.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Ship-To-regel – certificate issued for end recipient
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' found in delivery address. All 4 conditions met.
No explicit article number in certificate. 'Skoul Ruz 5467T' is a goods label, not an article number.
MATCH. Goods label 'Skoul Ruz 5467T', HS code 84836020, dimensions 83x63x67 cm all found in invoice.
Single weight value without GW/NW category, confirmed in invoice without contradictory alternative → MATCH per point 2.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Berg Prop Prod. AB är en vedertagen förkortning av Berg Propulsion Production AB som framgår av fakturan. Mottagaren Master M/V Skoul Ruz återfinns i fakturans leveransadress. Varubeskrivning, vikt (180 kg) och ursprungsland (Spanien) överensstämmer. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.consolidation_reasoning: All five applicable checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) returned MATCH. Consignor verified via commercial abbreviation rule 4.1.3.3 (confidence 0.92). Consignee verified via Ship-To rule 4.2.0.3 (confidence 0.88). Goods description verified via controlled text matching of goods label, HS code and dimensions (confidence 0.91). Quantity verified via förekomstkontroll of 180 kg (confidence 0.95). Country of origin verified via ISO normalization ES=Spain (confidence 0.97). All confidence values exceed 0.85 threshold. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. Result: IDENTICAL, AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-23D-868933 (utfärdat 2023-07-11, West Sweden Chamber of Commerce) verifierat mot Commercial Invoice 1903 (utfärdat av Berg Propulsion Production AB).

sections.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Tärnvägen 15, 475 40 HÖNÖ, SWEDEN
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' är en vedertagen kommersiell förkortning av fakturans utställare 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. Fullständigt juridiskt namn framgår uttryckligen i fakturan. Adressen (Tärnvägen 15, Hönö) är identisk. Land (Sweden) stämmer, bekräftat även via VAT-prefix SE. Alla villkor i regel 4.1.3.3 uppfyllda.

sections.certificate_value: Master M/V Skoul Ruz, Llyr Marine Gabon, Rue du Colonel Parant Littoral, BP 584 Port Gentil, Gabon
sections.invoice_value: Delivery address: Master M/V Skoul Ruz, C/o Navitrans CDG, ZA du Moulin Rue de la Croix, 95734 Roissy en France, FRANCE. Invoice address: Machinefabriek Bolier BV, Dordrecht, THE NETHERLANDS
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Master M/V Skoul Ruz' identifieras exakt i fakturans leveransadressfält. Fakturans faktureringsfält anger 'Machinefabriek Bolier BV' som köpare. Enligt Ship-To-regeln (4.2.0.3) utfärdas ursprungscertifikat regelmässigt för den slutliga mottagaren av varorna (fartyget), inte mellanledet. Fartygsnamnet bekräftas även i fakturans godsmärkning 'Skoul Ruz 5467T'. Adressskillnaden (Gabon vs Frankrike) förklaras av att leveransadressen i fakturan avser ett transitlager vid CDG-flygplatsen.

sections.certificate_value: One case - Skoul Ruz 5467T, 83x63x67 cm, HS CODE: 84836020, Country of origin: ES
sections.invoice_value: AK92786 GEAR TOOTH COUP, CN code: 84836020, Goods label: Skoul Ruz 5467T, 83x63x67cm 180kg
sections.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande element — godsmärkning 'Skoul Ruz 5467T', HS-kod '84836020', dimensioner '83x63x67 cm' — återfinns samtliga exakt i fakturan. Fakturan innehåller även artikelbeteckningen 'GEAR TOOTH COUP' som ytterligare produktdetalj, vilket inte utgör avvikelse enligt ensidighets­principen (2.1).

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) – numeriskt värde och enhet identifierade i faktura
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '180 kg' (box 7) identifieras exakt i fakturan som '180kg' i dimensions-/viktraden. Numeriskt värde (180) och enhet (kg) överensstämmer. Enstaka viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori, bekräftat i fakturan utan motstridande alternativ (4.4.2.2 punkt 2).

sections.rule_applied: Landnormalisering (4.5.4) – ISO alpha-2 kod ES = Spain
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'ES' (box 3) motsvarar ISO 3166-1 alpha-2-koden för Spanien. Fakturan anger uttryckligen 'Country of origin: Spain'. Exakt överensstämmelse efter normalisering.

human_readable_report.overall_summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) har verifierats som MATCH. Certifikat SEG-23D-868933 kan verifieras mot Commercial Invoice 1903. Dokumentparet rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: All applicable checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85. Lowest: consignee at 0.88.
